text:
Read the passage and answer the questions.
Kapil Dev is one of the greatest cricketers in the history of Indian cricket. He was born on 6th January 1959
in Chandigarh. In 1983 Kapil Dev made a history  by leading the Indian cricket team to its first ever World
Cup victory. The final match was played against the strong West Indies team at Lord’s , England. Kapil’s
leadership and brilliant strategies helped India win this iconic match. His outstanding catch to dismiss Viv
Richards and his knock of 175 runs against Zimbabwe in the same tournament remain unforgettable.
Kapil Dev showed the world that with determination and teamwork, even the underdogs can achieve
greatness. He is truly a hero in the history of Indian cricket.
a).How did Kapil help to win World Cup?
b).What did Kapil show to the world?
A GIRL CALLED GOLDEN
